JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.title: Inner Star Map
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.description:
Jiang Xiao Only. Core Relic. 
 Whenever you win a combat, gain Skill Points (Normal/Event +625, Elite +1250, Boss +2500). 
 Currently have [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points. 
 (Automatically obtains [red]Star Map Capability[/red], [red]Star Technique Quality Relic[/red], and [red]Star Power Level Relic[/red].)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP.flavor: A mystical star map residing within the mind—the very starting point of Jiang Xiao's toxic healer path.
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.title: Inner Star Map+
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.descrip:
Jiang Xiao Only. Core Relic. 
 Whenever you win a combat, gain Skill Points (Normal/Event +1250, Elite +2500, Boss +5000). 
 Currently have [gold]{points:diff()}[/gold] Skill Points. 
 (Automatically obtains [red]Star Map Capability[/red], [red]Star Technique Quality Relic[/red], and [red]Star Power Level Relic[/red].)
JIANGXIAOMOD-INNER_STAR_MAP_PLUS.flavor: A mystical star map residing within the mind—the very starting point of Jiang Xiao's toxic healer path.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.title: Star Power Level
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.descriptio:
Current Star Power Level: [gold]{level:choose(1|2|3|4|5|6):Stardust|Nebula|River|Sea|Astral|Endless}[/gold].
Gain [gold] {energy} [/gold] additional Energy.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_POWER_LEVEL.flavor: Star power surges like the tides; the lighting up of every single star signifies a qualitative leap.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.title: Star Technique Quality
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.descript:
Current Quality: [gold]{rank:choose(1|2|3|4|5|6|7):Bronze|Silver|Gold|Platinum|Diamond|Candle-Moon|Scorching-Sun}[/gold].
If your deck contains [gold]Space Rift[/gold], unlocks map flight with a maximum distance of [gold]{rank}[/gold] floors.
JIANGXIAOMOD-STAR_SKILL_QUALITY.flavor: Quality dictates the purity of star power. From Bronze to Scorching-Sun lies the chasm between mortals and gods.
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.title: Basic Martial Arts
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.description:
Records your combat training. Playing a corresponding card type increases its points by +1. Every [gold]10[/gold] points increases its Rank by [gold]1[/gold].

Unarmed Combat: Rank [gold]{UnarmedR}[/gold] ({UnarmedP}/70)
[blue]Rank 4: Draw 1 random Skill card from your Draw Pile.[/blue]
Xia Style Blade: Rank [gold]{BladeR}[/gold] ({BladeP}/70)
[blue]Rank 4: Draw 1 random Blade card from your Discard Pile.[/blue]
Bow Mastery: Rank [gold]{BowR}[/gold] ({BowP}/70)
[blue]Rank 4: Gain [gold]1[/gold] Energy.[/blue]
Dagger Mastery: Rank [gold]{DaggerR}[/gold] ({DaggerP}/70)
[blue]Rank 4: 25% chance to gain [gold]X[/gold] Energy and play a copy of it.[/blue]
Sky-Piercer Mastery: Rank [gold]{HalberdR}[/gold] ({HalberdP}/70)
[blue]Rank 4: Deal an additional [gold]25%[/gold] of current damage to all enemies.[/blue]
Combat Knife Mastery: Rank [gold]{CombatKnifeR}[/gold] ({CombatKnifeP}/70)
[blue]Rank 4: 25% chance to play 1 random Attack or Skill card from your Exhaust Pile.[/blue]
JIANGXIAOMOD-BASIC_ARTS.flavor: Every session of training, every drop of sweat, serves as a stepping stone to reaching the absolute pinnacle.
